method: context-aware LLM validation (local embeddings + Qwen judgment)

results.rule_text: Check if curves comply with minimum radius requirements for speeds of 160 km/hr and 130 kmph
results.reason: The requirement specifies 'at least 2.2 Degree' for curve radius but candidates provide radii in meters (length) while the requirement's unit (degrees) is an angle, making them incommensurable and the requirement ill-formed.

results.rule_text: Check whether vertical gradients are within permissible limits
results.reason: The requirement specifies 'no more than 400 m' for vertical gradients, but gradient is a dimensionless ratio (e.g., 1 in X), not a length — the unit and referent are inconsistent.

results.rule_text: Check whether vertical gradients are within permissible limits
results.reason: No proposed value for 'ruling gradient' exists in the DPR; only a standard_reference (1:200) is mentioned.

results.rule_text: Check the number of SPs per Route Km
results.reason: No candidate refers to the number of SPs (signal posts or similar infrastructure) in the DPR; all candidates only provide route length data.

results.rule_text: Check the number of SSPs per Route Km
results.reason: No candidate refers to 'SSPs per route km'; all candidates only provide route length measurements.

results.rule_text: Check the number of TSSs per Route Km
results.reason: No candidate refers to the number of TSSs (Train Stop Stations or similar infrastructure) per route km; all candidates only provide route length measurements.

results.requirement: exactly 1 per 50 Route Km or 100 Track Km
results.rule_text: Check the number of tower wagons/cars and sheds provided
results.reason: No candidate refers to the number of tower wagons or sheds provided in the DPR.

results.check_area: remote terminal units per route km

results.rule_text: Check Remote Terminal Unit count to determine if a new SCADA system is required
results.reason: None of the proposed candidates refer to 'remote terminal units' count; all candidates refer to 'remote height' or 'terminal year', which are unrelated quantities.

results.rule_text: Compare Route Km and Track Km to ensure consistency
results.reason: The requirement's condition (3rd and 4th line) does not apply to this project as the context does not confirm it is part of those lines.

results.rule_text: Check the minimum formation width as per standards
results.reason: The requirement applies specifically to 'double line' configurations, but the project context does not explicitly confirm that this is a double line (only total track length implies multiple tracks, which may or may not be double lines).

results.rule_text: Compare Route Km and Track Km to ensure consistency
results.reason: The project is a new line, not a doubling project, so the requirement's condition does not apply.
